# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...`, `go test ./...` pass
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...` is clean
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (under `## [Unreleased]`) if user-facing
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
